title: oldenlandia uniflora var. repens
intro: Oldenlandia uniflora var. repens, also known as creeping oldenlandia or creeping fleabane, is a creeping herbaceous plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Asia and widely cultivated in various parts of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia uniflora var. repens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and help in the treatment of various infectious diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed orally for medicinal purposes, or it can also be used in the form of ointments and poultices for topical application.
